data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a dry northeast monsoon, the weather will be generally fine over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. The temperature difference between day and night will be relatively large over inland areas. With the monsoon moderating progressively early to midweek next week, temperatures will rise and the weather will become humid over southern China gradually. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of southern China in the latter part of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260315","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"East force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
